description: This file contains utility functions and class definitions for handling responses, authentication, and JSON encoding in an AWS Lambda environment, specifically related to AWS services and custom enumerations for status and service identifiers.

classes.name: TenantTier
classes.description: Enumeration representing different tenant tiers such as Platinum, Premium, Standard, and Basic.

classes.name: StatusCodes
classes.description: Enumeration for HTTP status codes like Success, Unauthorized, and Not Found.

classes.name: Service_Identifier
classes.description: Enumeration for service identifiers such as Shared Services and Business Services.

methods.name: create_success_response
methods.description: Creates a standardized HTTP success response with CORS headers and a message body.

methods.name: create_unauthorized_response
methods.description: Creates a standardized HTTP unauthorized response with CORS headers.

methods.name: create_notfound_response
methods.description: Creates a standardized HTTP not found response with a message body.

methods.name: get_auth
methods.description: Generates AWS request authentication object using boto3 credentials for a given host and region.

methods.name: get_headers
methods.description: Extracts headers from an event object.

methods.name: generate_response
methods.description: Generates a JSON response with CORS headers from an input object.

methods.name: encode_to_json_object
methods.description: Encodes an input object into a JSON string using jsonpickle with specific options.
